title: Edible Ores
description: Craft ores that you can eat, Yummers!
body:
# Edible Ores
Craft Ores into edible resources that give you special effects!

# How to use
Put any of the supported Ingredients into a crafting table to get an edible ore!

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Example Crafting recipe: put diamond into crafting table to get edible diamond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bba887fb8843241d2b1930cb752279cef2a57a98.png)

</details>



# Supported Recipes
- Coal
- Copper Ingots
- Diamonds
- Emeralds
- Gold Ingots
- Iron Ingots
- Lapis Lazuli
- Netherite Ingots
- Netherite Scrap
